name: ML Capital Group, Inc.
summary: ML Capital Group, Inc. produces products and provides services that support the medical marijuana industry. It is producing and marketing its products and services under the Superstar Products brand name, including vapor pens, mobile applications, and books. The company offers SUPERSTAR MMJ DISPENSARIES APP, a smartphone application that provides location based on services and detailed information on medical marijuana dispensaries; SUPERSTAR VAPOR PEN, an vapor smokeless devise, which enables consumers to consume tobacco, wax, or liquid form in clean and safer manner; and SUPERSTAR MMJ RECIPE BOOK, which enables consumers to create various meals, drinks, and sweets favorites with recipe book. ML Capital Group, Inc. was founded in 2009 and is based in Fountain Hills, Arizona.
